greeting: Hi — what are you working through?
overwhelmed: That sounds like a lot. Let’s make this smaller: {next_step}
working: I’m checking {task}. I’ll update you when the result changes or I need you.
off: OpenOpen is off. No new model calls or actions are running. Your local state remains on this Mac.
duplicate: This was already completed, so I won’t repeat it.
ambiguousEffect: I can’t verify whether {effect} happened. I won’t mark it done or retry automatically.
changedConfirmation: The previous confirmation is no longer current. I’ve prepared a new revision for you to review.
permission: {benefit} This requires {scope}. macOS will ask in {location}; if you decline, {untouched} remains untouched.
needUser: I need you to {action} in {location} on {device}. {auth_prompt} It should take about {minutes} minutes.
reminderTimeRequired: What time should I use? I won’t guess.
preferenceCandidate: You prefer {preference}. Use this for this conversation, or remember it for future conversations?
memoryCorrection: I’ll stop using that preference. You can edit or remove the stored item.
permissionDeclined: That access remains off. I’ll continue with anything that does not need it.
liveness: I’m still checking {task}. Nothing material has changed yet.
modelUnavailable: I couldn’t get a reliable response, so I kept your work unchanged. {recovery}
pendingConfirmation: This is still waiting for your confirmation. Nothing has been sent or written.
unapprovedConversation: Only the self-chat you selected is connected, so I didn’t read or reply here.
